_comment: TEMPLATE — BE2+FE: replace TODO fields with real audio. Recommended: 3 LibriVox short story chapters (public domain speech, transcribes ~95%+ accuracy with Whisper-base). Re-encode all clips to 16kHz mono WAV before hosting. Pin by T+22; do not improvise on stage.

_recommendedContent.candidate_a: LibriVox — Sherlock Holmes short stories. Search 'Adventures of Sherlock Holmes' on librivox.org, pick 3 chapters of ~10 min each. Each chapter has a direct MP3 URL on archive.org.
_recommendedContent.candidate_b: LibriVox — H.G. Wells 'The Time Machine'. Single-narrator chapters, ~8-12 min each. Cleaner audio than multi-narrator works.
_recommendedContent.candidate_c: Internet Archive — Project Gutenberg LibriVox collection. archive.org/details/librivoxaudio
_recommendedContent.candidate_d: Teammate self-recorded: 3 × 10-min readings of any public-domain text. Lowest-friction, full control over audio quality and licensing.

name: demo-fixture-2026-04-26
groundTruthSrtUrl: TODO: https://<host>/demo-ground-truth.srt — generated by running Whisper-large on the concatenated audio once, saving the SRT, hosting it
